name: Community Med Trans-South
principals: Unknown owner (Community Medical Transportation, Inc. / DBA Community Med Trans)
districts_or_customers: Private-pay medical patients in Fresno area; no identified school district contracts
recent_news: BBB-accredited family-owned NEMT operator in Fresno since 2014; no M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: NOT a Summit fit — pure non-emergency medical transport (wheelchair/stretcher/dialysis), no school-bus or SPED district contracting. Sub-scale (~8 employees, ~$0.6M revenue). Skip.

name: Access EZ Transport Inc
districts_or_customers: Individual disabled/wheelchair riders in DuPage County; no identified school district contracts
recent_news: 16-year-old micro NEMT operator (since Sep 2009); no public M&A or growth news. 4.8-star BBB profile.
fit_notes: NOT a Summit fit — wheelchair NEMT only, no yellow buses, no SPED district contracts identified. Sub-scale single-operator business. Skip.

name: Integrity Secure Transport LLC

districts_or_customers: Mental-health and medical patients in Quincy/Adams County IL; no identified school district contracts

fit_notes: NOT a Summit fit — NEMT/mental-health and taxi service, no school-bus operations. Young (5-year-old) micro-operator with two paramedic owners. Skip.
